task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the 'Projects' workspace in the Nuxeo web interface.
The screen shows the 'Q3 Status Report' note document opened in the Nuxeo interface.

task_completion.description: Export the note as a PDF
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows an export action, a print-to-PDF dialog, or a downloaded PDF file corresponding to the note.

task_completion.description: Initiate creation of a new File document in the Projects workspace
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows a 'New Document' dialog or form with 'File' selected as the document type within the Projects workspace.
The screen shows the file upload area in the document creation form with the exported PDF file selected or uploaded.

task_completion.description: Set the correct title and description for the new document
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document creation/edit form shows 'Q3 Status Report - Archived' in the title field and 'Static archive of the Q3 report' in the description field.

task_completion.description: Save and view the newly created document
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the successfully created document 'Q3 Status Report - Archived' in the Projects workspace or its individual document view page.

integrity.description: The agent used the Nuxeo web interface to perform the actions
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Nuxeo web UI in a browser, without the use of terminal commands, scripts, or API calls to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: The PDF was genuinely exported from the note
integrity.visual_evidence: The PDF should be generated via the browser's print functionality or Nuxeo's export feature, rather than being manually created in a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The new document was created in the correct workspace
integrity.visual_evidence: The breadcrumbs or workspace view should confirm the new document is located in the 'Projects' workspace.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target workspace: /default-domain/workspaces/Projects. Original note title: 'Q3 Status Report'. Archived document title: 'Q3 Status Report - Archived'. Expected description: 'Static archive of the Q3 report'. Expected MIME type: application/pdf.
